text:
Created attachment 197425
Trivial patch

URL: https://github.com/jhawthorn/fzy/releases/tag/1.0

Features:
Support UTF-8
Support readline-like editing
Quit on Esc
Redraw on terminal resize
Bracketed paste escapes are ignored

Performance:
Initialize tty interface before reading stdin
